headline: Car park firm NCP collapses with nearly 700 jobs at risk
deck: The car park operator says demand for parking has not recovered to pre-Covid levels, as its administrators look to sell the business.
cnSummary: 英国停车场运营商NCP宣布倒闭，近700个工作岗位面临风险。该公司称，疫情后停车需求未恢复到疫前水平。管理人员正寻求出售该业务。

headline: Starmer announces £53m support to help with heating oil costs
deck: The money will be for "vulnerable" households who have faced a sharp rise in energy bills since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran.
cnSummary: 英国首相斯塔默宣布投入5300万英镑，为易受伤害家庭提供供暖油费补助。由于美以伊朗冲突导致能源账单大幅上涨，该补助针对面临能源成本困难的脆弱群体。

headline: Bank of America settles over Epstein claims
deck: The lawsuit had accused the bank of facilitating Epstein's sex trafficking.
cnSummary: 美国银行因涉嫌为爱泼斯坦性贩运活动提供便利而达成和解。该诉讼指控美国银行知晓爱泼斯坦的非法活动，仍为其提供银行服务，帮助其进行性贩运犯罪。和解条款未公开披露。

headline: Firms urged to check if other users edited their data on Companies House
deck: The glitch meant logged-in users could view and edit other companies' details without their consent.
cnSummary: 英国公司注册处发现系统漏洞，登录用户可在未经授权情况下查看和编辑其他公司的信息。该漏洞影响多家企业数据安全，公司注册处已敦促所有企业检查自身数据是否遭他人篡改。

headline: Is this product 'human-made'? The race to establish an AI-free logo
deck: The backlash to the growing use of the tech has led to an explosion in attempts to come up with 'AI-Free' logo that could be used globally.
cnSummary: 随着人工智能应用日益普遍，消费者对AI生成内容的反感持续增长。为满足市场需求，全球范围内出现了大量创意，试图开发通用的"无AI"标志，以标识完全由人类创作的产品和内容。

headline: She spent 16 hours on Instagram in a day. It's up to a jury to decide if Meta is to blame
deck: A landmark lawsuit will set the stage for thousands of people who say social media platforms are intentionally addictive.
cnSummary: 一名女性一天在Instagram上花费16小时，起诉Meta公司。该诉讼将成为里程碑案例，涉及数千人声称社交媒体平台故意设计成令人成瘾。陪审团需要判定Meta是否应承担责任。

headline: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
deck: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.
cnSummary: 欧洲领导人对特朗普关于伊朗危机的要求持谨慎态度，不愿快速承诺帮助美国保护霍尔木兹海峡。然而，他们也认识到对伊朗问题消极应对并非可行之策，陷入两难境地。

headline: Meta and TikTok let harmful content rise after evidence outrage drove engagement, say whistleblowers
deck: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.
cnSummary: 据举报人披露，Meta和TikTok在了解其算法依靠用户愤怒驱动互动后，故意允许更多有害内容出现在用户信息流中。两家公司优先选择能引发愤怒的内容以提升用户参与度，尽管明知其危害性。

headline: Iran hits key UAE oil port and Dubai airport
deck: The port of Fujairah plays a crucial role in helping keep global supplies moving when the Strait of Hormuz is blocked.
cnSummary: 伊朗对阿联酋关键油港和迪拜机场进行打击。富查伊拉港在霍尔木兹海峡被封锁时对维持全球供应至关重要。这一举动可能对全球能源供应产生重大影响。

headline: Nvidia GTC 2026: CEO Jensen Huang sees $1 trillion in orders for Blackwell and Vera Rubin through '27
deck: At Nvidia's annual developer conference, CEO Jensen Huang said the company is seeing booming demand for its latest technology.
cnSummary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋在GTC 2026年会上表示，公司在Blackwell和Vera Rubin两款产品上获得了高达1万亿美元的订单，订单周期延伸至2027年，反映出市场对其最新技术的强劲需求。

headline: Trump signals coalition to force open Strait of Hormuz is not ready yet: 'Some are less than enthusiastic'
deck: President Donald Trump said Monday that some U.S. allies are not willing to join a coalition to protect tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
cnSummary: 特朗普表示，美国正筹建保护霍尔木兹海峡油轮的联盟，但部分盟国积极性不高，联盟尚未准备就绪。他指出一些盟国"热情不足"，暗示组建该联盟面临困难。

headline: Bill Gurley on AI bubble: A bunch of people got rich quick and a reset is coming
deck: Gurley's VC firm Benchmark was an early Uber investor, and he helped oust then-CEO Travis Kalanick in 2017.
cnSummary: 风险投资家比尔·格利警示AI泡沫即将破裂。他认为许多人通过AI热潮快速致富，但调整期正在来临。格利所在的基准资本公司曾是Uber早期投资者，他还在2017年帮助赶下了时任CEO卡兰尼克。
